did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper focuses on evaluating empirical and semianalytical spectral reflectance models for estimating surface suspended sediment concentration (SSC) in estuarine and coastal waters. It does not involve dermatology, skin cancer, or AI/ML methods for medical diagnosis; the 'backpropagation' mentioned in index terms refers to remote sensing data processing, not neural networks for dermatology.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
